overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, crossing a neon-lit intersection with towering skyscrapers and ending at a waterfront promenade. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring cinematic lighting and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon signage

events.description: teal sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
white van enters the intersection from the left side

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for traffic to clear before crossing

notable_agents.action: purple pickup truck waiting at the intersection on the right side
teal sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
futuristic elevated transit structure with glowing blue lights spanning across the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall red structural pole with traffic signals and signage

segments.scene_description: Standing at a futuristic city intersection at dusk, surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera waits as vehicles including a purple truck and teal sedan pass through the crosswalk, with an elevated highway bridge visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with moderate foot traffic

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the right side of the frame
pedestrian with dark hair passes close to the camera on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk through groups of pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: blue sports car with headlights on driving past the crosswalk
group of pedestrians crossing in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing the red traffic light structure on the left. A blue sports car drives by on the right while pedestrians cross in opposing directions, and the neon-lit mega towers remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the sidewalk approaching the waterfront
view opens up to reveal the water body and waterfront skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the city skyline across the water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair walking along the waterfront railing

entered.detail: concrete walkway along the water's edge with metal railings
calm dark water reflecting the city lights, separating the promenade from the distant skyline

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade as the scene opens up to reveal a body of water with the neon-lit mega tower skyline reflected on its surface. The camera moves past sparse pedestrian traffic along the railing, with the elevated highway bridge still visible in the distance across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dense, neon-lit urban intersection toward the open expanse of a waterfront promenade at dusk. It begins stationary at a busy crossing, watching a purple truck and teal sedan pass beneath the shadow of towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway bridge. As the camera moves forward, it navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic and past a red traffic light structure while a blue sports car streaks by on the right. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the intersection behind, transitioning onto a wide promenade where the city's mega towers are reflected on the surface of the water. Finally, the movement continues along the railing past sparse pedestrians, keeping the distant highway bridge in view against the glowing skyline.
